title: Application Service Health Timeline
description: Tracks application lifecycle events (startup, shutdown, errors) and request throughput across CRM and Drone Shop. Use for availability monitoring and deployment impact analysis.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and (message like '%started%' or message like '%shutting down%' or level = 'ERROR') | stats count as Events by 'service.name', level, message | sort -Events
